sentences.target: On cherche une activité pour cet après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn aktivite puʁ sɛt apʁɛ midi/

translations.fr: On cherche une activité pour cet après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn aktivite puʁ sɛt apʁɛ midi/
translations.en: We're looking for an activity for this afternoon.
translations.es: Estamos buscando una actividad para esta tarde.
translations.de: Wir suchen eine Aktivität für heute Nachmittag.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un'attività per questo pomeriggio.
translations.ko: 오늘 오후에 할 활동을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找今天下午的活动。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度搵今日下午可以做嘅活動。
translations.ru: Мы ищем, чем заняться сегодня днём.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma atividade para esta tarde.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים פעילות להיום אחר הצהריים.
translations.tr: Bu öğleden sonra için bir etkinlik arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một hoạt động cho chiều nay.
translations.ar: نبحث عن نشاط لبعد ظهر اليوم.
translations.nl: We zoeken een activiteit voor vanmiddag.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо заняття на сьогодні пообіді.
translations.hi: हम आज दोपहर के लिए कोई गतिविधि ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε μια δραστηριότητα για σήμερα το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en aktivitet for i ettermiddag.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari kegiatan untuk sore ini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en aktivitet till i eftermiddag.
translations.ro: Căutăm o activitate pentru după-amiaza aceasta.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en aktivitet til i eftermiddag.
translations.ja: 今日の午後にできる活動を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; here likely meaning ‘we’. Triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreement with ‘On’).
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing a count noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘cherche’.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular before vowel or h muet; agrees with ‘après-midi’.
Invariable compound noun meaning ‘afternoon’; complement of ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Tu proposes une activité pour les enfants.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɔpoz yn aktivite puʁ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu proposes une activité pour les enfants.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɔpoz yn aktivite puʁ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/
translations.en: You suggest an activity for the kids.
translations.es: Propones una actividad para los niños.
translations.de: Du schlägst eine Aktivität für die Kinder vor.
translations.zh-Hans: 你提出一个适合孩子们的活动。
translations.yue: 你提議一個俾小朋友嘅活動。
translations.pt: Você sugere uma atividade para as crianças.
translations.vi: Bạn đề xuất một hoạt động cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Je stelt een activiteit voor kinderen voor.
translations.hi: तुम बच्चों के लिए एक गतिविधि सुझाते हो.
translations.el: Προτείνεις μια δραστηριότητα για τα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Du foreslår en aktivitet for barna.
translations.id: Kamu menyarankan sebuah kegiatan untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Du föreslår en aktivitet för barnen.
translations.ro: Tu propui o activitate pentru copii.
translations.da: Du foreslår en aktivitet for børnene.
translations.ja: あなたは子どもたちのための活動を提案します。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun (informal).
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘proposes’.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/target phrase.
Definite article, plural; agrees with ‘enfants’.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

translations.en: We cancel the activity if it rains.
translations.de: Wir sagen die Veranstaltung ab, wenn es regnet.
translations.zh-Hans: 如果下雨，我们就取消这项活动。
translations.yue: 如果落雨，我哋就取消呢個活動。
translations.ru: Мы отменяем мероприятие, если идёт дождь.
translations.he: אנחנו מבטלים את הפעילות אם יורד גשם.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hủy hoạt động nếu trời mưa.
translations.nl: We annuleren de activiteit als het regent.
translations.uk: Ми скасовуємо заняття, якщо йде дощ.
translations.hi: अगर बारिश होती है, तो हम गतिविधि रद्द कर देते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi avlyser aktiviteten hvis det regner.
translations.sv: Vi ställer in aktiviteten om det regnar.
translations.da: Vi aflyser aktiviteten, hvis det regner.
translations.ja: 雨が降ったら活動を中止します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Elided definite article (‘le’ → ‘l’’) plus noun; feminine singular; direct object.
Elision of ‘si’ + ‘il’; introduces a conditional clause (‘if it’).
Impersonal verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (‘il pleut’ = ‘it is raining’).

sentences.target: Je change d'activité pour me détendre.

translations.fr: Je change d'activité pour me détendre.
translations.de: Ich wechsle die Aktivität, um mich zu entspannen.
translations.pt: Eu mudo de atividade para relaxar.
translations.vi: Tôi đổi hoạt động để thư giãn.
translations.nl: Ik wissel van activiteit om te ontspannen.
translations.hi: मैं आराम करने के लिए गतिविधि बदल रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg bytter aktivitet for å slappe av.
translations.sv: Jag byter aktivitet för att koppla av.
translations.ro: Îmi schimb activitatea ca să mă relaxez.
translations.da: Jeg skifter aktivitet for at slappe af.
translations.ja: リラックスするために活動を変えます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Elision of ‘de’ + ‘activité’; functions as the complement of ‘changer’ (‘to change activity’).
Preposition of purpose, introducing an infinitival clause.
1st person singular clitic object/reflexive pronoun; attached to the infinitive.
Infinitive verb; with ‘me’ forms the pronominal construction ‘se détendre’ expressing purpose.

Je change d'activité pour me détendre.
